Attach a model to a pipeline

Source: R/pipeline.R
milt_pipe_model.Rd

The model is the final stage of the pipeline. It will be fitted on the transformed training series when milt_pipeline_fit() is called.

Usage

milt_pipe_model(pipeline, model, ...)

Arguments

pipeline

A MiltPipeline.

model

Either a MiltModel object (from milt_model()) or a character model name (e.g. "auto_arima").

...

Hyperparameters forwarded to milt_model() when model is a character string.

Value

The updated MiltPipeline, invisibly.

See also

milt_pipeline_fit(), milt_pipeline()

Other pipeline: milt_pipe_step_calendar(), milt_pipe_step_fourier(), milt_pipe_step_lag(), milt_pipe_step_rolling(), milt_pipe_step_scale(), milt_pipeline(), milt_pipeline_fit(), milt_pipeline_forecast(), milt_pipeline_transform()

Examples

# \donttest{
pipe <- milt_pipeline() |>
  milt_pipe_step_lag(lags = 1:6) |>
  milt_pipe_model("naive")
# }
